item.title: Notiqflow 0.3.0
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.3.0

  • Notiqflow learns your corrections. After dictation, spelling and capitalization corrections can be saved with your confirmation and applied to your very next dictation.
  • You stay in control. When you correct a spelling, name, or phrase, Notiqflow asks whether it should always make that change. Choose Always or Not now without leaving the app you are typing in, then edit or remove saved replacements in Dictionary settings.
  • A smaller, quieter Flow Bar. The normal bar is roughly half its previous width, and processing is represented by the animated waveform instead of status labels.
  • Private by design. Correction learning briefly reads only the field Notiqflow just inserted into, stops after 30 seconds or when focus changes, and runs entirely on your Mac. It can be disabled in Settings > Dictionary.
